<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (golden tests green)
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (content-sync gate green)
- [ ] Plain language, zero jargon, zero shame — terms defined on first use
- [ ] No promotion, CTAs, or affiliate links (education-first)
- [ ] US-only content (W-4, FICA, 401(k), US credit scoring, etc.)

### If this changes a number, rate, calculator, or ⚙ mechanics lesson

- [ ] Authoritative reference URL for the changed value/math is linked below
  (see the source whitelist in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Golden tests updated to match the new values — and green
- [ ] `lastReviewed` updated on any touched lesson
- [ ] I understand **maintainer accuracy review is required** for these changes — no auto-merge
